overall.description: Third-person game engine footage showing a female character first standing still and then walking across a vast, flat salt flat or desert landscape under a clear blue sky. A prominent white cliff formation is visible on the horizon, and the character walks toward it before continuing past. On-screen UI elements indicate keyboard controls.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast open salt flat desert with distant cliff

agents.ego_description: standing completely still facing away from the camera, looking toward the horizon

entered.detail: large white rock formation visible on the left horizon
flat white salt crust ground extending to the horizon
clear cloudless blue sky covering the upper portion of the frame

segments.scene_description: The character stands motionless on a vast, flat salt flat under a clear blue sky. A white cliff formation is visible in the distance to the left. The camera remains stationary behind the character in a classic third-person game perspective.

events.description: character begins walking forward across the salt flat toward the distant cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the flat terrain, moving toward and then past the white cliff formation

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking across the salt flat, with the camera smoothly following from behind. The white cliff formation moves from the left side of the frame to the right as the character approaches and passes it. The terrain remains consistently flat and barren throughout the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a static observation of a barren landscape into a steady journey across a vast salt flat. It begins with the camera stationary behind a character who stands motionless under a clear blue sky, with a white cliff formation visible in the far distance to the left. As the character begins to walk, the camera smoothly follows from behind, maintaining a consistent third-person perspective across the flat terrain. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the distant landmark, causing the white cliff to glide from the left side of the frame toward the right. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum, passing the formation and moving further into the expansive, barren white void.
